displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Fried Mee Sua:
1. Quick fry the tai ann mee sua in boiling oil and remove
2. After it has softened in boiling soup, take out again and roast it with meat, vegetables, etc., as desired, until done
• Mee Sua Soup:
1. Cook tai ann mee sua in boiling water first
2. After stirring it loose with chopsticks, take out and put it in soup cooked with meat, vegetables, etc

metaData.Preparation:
1. Cook the noodles in boiling water for about 2 minutes, (for broad ribbons about 3 minutes)
2. Stir tenderly until the noodles have loosened
3. Drain the hot water and then soak it thoroughly in clear cold water
4. Then serve with your favourite recipe

metaData.Preparation:
• For Soup Noodle:
1. Put Megah Mee into boiled soup and add your favourite ingredients eg. chicken meat, prawns, egg or vegetables etc
2. Simmer for 2 minutes and serve immediately
• For Fried Noodle:
1. Put Megah Mee into boiling water until loosen
2. Drain away water
3. Heat cooking oil in wok and Megah Mee, fry for a few minutes
4. Add seasoning and ingredients eg. chicken meat, prawns, egg or vegetables etc.
5. Serve hot

• Authentic Japanese noodle of the highest quality
• 98% fat free
• Great for stir-fry and easy to prepare
• Produced in patented high-temperature, short-time drying method which gives the noodle a firm texture

metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
Cook noodle in rapid boiling water for 4 minutes (salt or oil is not needed)
• For Stir-Fry:
1. Cook noodle in rapid boiling water for 3 minutes (noodles will receive extra cooking in the wok)
2. Drain, then rinse well with cold water
Drain again
• To Reheat:
Briefly submerge in hot water

metaData.Key Information: A part of the dry noodles range from Myojo, this Ramen Char Mee offers a savory taste for days when hot soup feels a little too much for the hot weather.
metaData.Preparation:
1. Put noodles into 450ml of boiling water in a pot and boil
2. Cook for 4 minutes
3. Remove pot from heat and put seasoning powder to the noodles
4. Mix well and serve immediately
